sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109996" key="u(yite/nwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ-τένων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n109996.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with high-strained sinews, strong-necked,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταῦροι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">202</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
